channel.title: Comments on: Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Tom
item.dc:creator: Tom
item.description: Your discussion about the resealable can headed exactly to why I want it: I don't want to drink 12 to 16 ounces of a 7%+ ABV beer in one sitting. It's just my personal preference with big beers. I recap bottles all the time for finishing the next day. Yes, the carbination flattens and (I guess) the flavor changes. But I don't drink these beers for their carbination, and the changes in taste are just part of the journey for me. So for an oddball like me, this resealable can is great! Bring 'em on! And John's idea of it being a mini growler is super!
item.content:encoded: Your discussion about the resealable can headed exactly to why I want it: I don’t want to drink 12 to 16 ounces of a 7%+ ABV beer in one sitting. It’s just my personal preference with big beers. I recap bottles all the time for finishing the next day. Yes, the carbination flattens and (I guess) the flavor changes. But I don’t drink these beers for their carbination, and the changes in taste are just part of the journey for me. So for an oddball like me, this resealable can is great! Bring ’em on! And John’s idea of it being a mini growler is super!
